arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Eric Dier takes fresh swipe at Tottenham - 'I definitely felt that' - football.london
arts.sum: After playing just four times in the first half of the 2023/24 season, Dier left Tottenham to join Bayern Munich in January 2024 on a six-month loan deal would expire at the same time as his Spurs contract that summer. Bayern Munich star Eric Dier has taken a swipe at former club Tottenham and believes he wasn't "given a fair shake" during his time in England.

arts.ttl: Manchester City could sign dream Kevin De Bruyne replacement in shock swap deal
arts.sum: Manchester City are gearing up for a big summer of spending as they look to rebuild their struggling side and fill it with more young talent - with Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz eyed as a replacement for Kevin De Bruyne

arts.ttl: Man City target Leverkusen's Wirtz - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester City want Bayer Leverkusen's Florian Wirtz, Alexander Isak could leave Newcastle in the summer and Paul Pogba may join Inter Miami.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 'open talks' with 'integral first-team player' over new contract
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly in the early stages of negotiations over a new long-term contract for one of the key members of Ange Postecoglou's squad.

arts.ttl: Claudio Echeverri: Possible debut date 'revealed' for Man City's £12.5m signing dubbed the 'next Lionel Messi'
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola could hand Claudio Echeverri his Manchester City debut as early as this weekend, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Manchester City target Porto goalkeeper Diogo Costa to replace Ederson
arts.sum: Manchester City are planning to part ways with Ederson (31) and replace him with Diogo Costa (25) from FC Porto, according to a report from Foot Mercato this Monday. The Cityzens…
